mapper.insert:
insert into leave_request
applicant_type, applicant_id, approver_id, student_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, is_course_rescheduled, status, create_time,
values
#{applicantType}, #{applicantId}, #{approverId}, #{studentId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{isCourseRescheduled}, '待审批', now(),
insert into leave_approval_log (leave_request_id, approver_id, action, comment, create_time) values (#{id}, #{approverId}, #{action}, #{comment}, now())
mapper.select: select l.id, l.applicant_type, l.applicant_id, l.approver_id, l.student_id, s.name as student_name, l.leave_type, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.reason, l.status, l.is_course_rescheduled, l.create_time, l.update_time, log.id as log_id, log.approver_id as log_approver_id, log.create_time as log_create_time, log.action as log_action, log.comment as log_comment, CASE l.applicant_type WHEN 'STUDENT' THEN s.name WHEN 'TEACHER' THEN t.name END as applicant_name, COALESCE(CASE l.applicant_type WHEN 'STUDENT' THEN head_t.name WHEN 'TEACHER' THEN a.name END, '待分配') as approver_name from leave_request l left join student s on l.student_id = s.id left join teacher t on l.applicant_id = t.id and l.applicant_type = 'TEACHER' left join leave_approval_log log on l.id = log.leave_request_id left join teacher head_t on l.approver_id = head_t.id and l.applicant_type = 'STUDENT' left join admin a on l.approver_id = a.id and l.applicant_type = 'TEACHER' where l.id = #{id}

select l.id, l.approver_id, l.create_time, l.action, l.comment, coalesce(t.name, a.name) as approverName from leave_approval_log l left join teacher t on l.approver_id = t.id left join admin a on l.approver_id = a.id
l.leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId}
select c.head_teacher_id from student s inner join class c on s.class_id = c.id where s.id = #{studentId}

select a.id from teacher t inner join admin a on t.college_id = a.college_id and a.account_status = '启用' where t.id = #{teacherId} order by case a.role when '超级管理员' then 0 else 1 end, a.id asc limit 1
